recommendations.title: Long Weekend
recommendations.overview: When a suburban couple goes camping for the weekend at a remote beach, they discover that nature isn't in an accommodating mood.

recommendations.title: Romina
recommendations.overview: A shocking assault inspires horrific violence when a group of teens encounters a girl from their school while camping in a remote spot.

recommendations.title: Evidence
recommendations.overview: Ryan is making a documentary on his friend, Brett, about camping for the first time. However, once they begin camping, they discover that there is a mysterious figure that is hunting them.

recommendations.title: Dark Cloud
recommendations.overview: Following the aftermath of a horrific accident, a woman is voluntarily subjected to artificial intelligence for rehabilitation.

recommendations.title: The Whole Truth
recommendations.overview: When two siblings stumble on a strange hole in the wall of their grandparents' house, horrifying incidents reveal sinister secrets about their family.

recommendations.title: Shirley
recommendations.overview: A famous horror writer finds inspiration for her next book after she and her husband take in a young couple.

recommendations.title: Willow Creek

recommendations.title: Evil Eye
recommendations.overview: A seemingly perfect romance turns dark when a mother becomes convinced her daughter’s new boyfriend has a sinister connection to her own past.

recommendations.title: The Children
recommendations.overview: A relaxing Christmas vacation turns into a terrifying fight for survival as the children begin to turn on their parents.

recommendations.title: The Trust
recommendations.genres: Thriller, Drama, Crime, Action, Comedy, Mystery
recommendations.overview: A pair of cops investigating a drug invasion stumble upon a mysterious bank vault.
